stemHtml: You are descending from FL270 in ISA conditions, maintaining a constant CAS of 300 kt. At the beginning of the descent your cross-check of the instruments shows TAS at 444 kt and Mach 0.75. You check the instruments again at some point during the descent, which option contains readings that you would expect to see?

options.a: TAS at 487 kt and Mach at 0.65
options.b: TAS at 400 kt and Mach at 0.65
options.c: TAS at 400 kt and Mach at 0.84
options.d: TAS at 487 kt and Mach at 0.84
